zh.lifeSummary: 當William Offley於1477年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，他的父親John Offley28歲，母親Margery Scott23歲。他於1500年與Elizabeth Wright Dillorne在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1517年被列為alderman of chester after the family moved to chester。他去世於1560年在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年83歲，埋葬在英國爾切斯特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Offley于1477年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德时，他的父亲John Offley28岁，母亲Margery Scott23岁。他于1500年与Elizabeth Wright Dillorne在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1517年被列为alderman of chester after the family moved to chester。他去世于1560年在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德享年83岁，埋葬在英国爾切斯特聖 比特也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Offley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Offley (Hertfordshire), Bishops Offley (Staffordshire), or High Offley (Staffordshire). The placenames derive from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When William Offley was born in 1477, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Offley, was 28 and his mother, Margery Scott, was 23. He married Elizabeth Wright Dillorne in 1500, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. In 1517, at the age of 40, his occupation is listed as alderman of chester after the family moved to chester. He died in 1560, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Offley est né en 1477, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Offley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margery Scott, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wright Dillorne en 1500, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. En 1517, à l’âge de 40 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est alderman of chester after the family moved to chester. Il est décédé en 1560, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterré à St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Offley 1477 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Offley 28 und seine Mutter Margery Scott 23. Er hat 1500 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Wright Dillorne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. 1517, als er 40 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als alderman of chester after the family moved to chester aufgeführt. Er starb 1560 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Stafford, Staffordshire, England und wurde in St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Wright Dillorne nel 1500, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: William Offleyが1477年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで生まれた時，父John Offleyは28歳，母Margery Scottは23歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでElizabeth Wright Dillorneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1517年，40歳の時，職業はalderman of chester after the family moved to chesterと記録されている。彼は1560年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで83歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアチェスタースト ペテル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, En: 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: William Offley(이)가 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Offley(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Scott(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Elizabeth Wright Dillorne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1517년, 40세의 나이로 그의 직업은 alderman of chester after the family moved to chester이었다. 그는 1560년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 체스터 스트 피터'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Offley nasceu em 1477, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Offley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margery Scott, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wright Dillorne em 1500, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Em 1517, com 40 anos, sua profissão aparece como alderman of chester after the family moved to chester. Ele faleceu em 1560, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultado em St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Offley родился в 1477 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Offley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Scott, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wright Dillorne в 1500 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. В 1517 году, в возрасте 40 лет,  он работал по профессии alderman of chester after the family moved to chester. Он умер в 1560 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и был похоронен в местности ст питир'с чурч, честир, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Offley nació en 1477, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Offley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margery Scott, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wright Dillorne en 1500, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. En 1517, a la edad de 40 años, su ocupación registrada era alderman of chester after the family moved to chester. Murió en 1560, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultado en St Peter's Church, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
